app.title: Career Agent
app.tagline: Local-first career assistant. Your files stay on your device. This is a static bundle with no backend server.
app.privacyNotice: Your files stay on your device. Career Agent is not fully offline: when you ask it to use an AI provider, only a minimised, redacted payload is sent to that provider — never your Memory Store files.

statement.heading: Your privacy
statement.filesOnDevice: Your files stay on your device. Career Agent reads, writes, and stores your Memory Store locally; it never uploads your files to a backend server.
statement.notFullyOffline: Career Agent is not fully offline. When you ask it to use an AI or speech-to-text provider, only a minimised, redacted payload is sent to the provider you chose — never your Memory Store files, and never any other destination.
statement.fullyOffline: Career Agent is fully offline. Every provider you selected is a Local Provider running on your own device, so no redacted payload leaves the device — your files and your data stay entirely on your machine.
statement.trainingExclusion: Your data is excluded from any model training or improvement use unless you give explicit, informed consent. Consent is off by default and you can withdraw it at any time.

consent.heading: Model training and improvement
consent.description: Allow your data to be used for model training or improvement. This is off by default; nothing is used for training without your explicit consent.
consent.statusGranted: You have consented to training/improvement use. You can withdraw consent at any time.
consent.statusExcluded: Your data is excluded from training/improvement use.

networkLabel.heading: Third-party network operations
networkLabel.none: No third-party network operation has run yet.

clarification.incomplete: We could not find a value for "{{field}}" in your documents. Please provide it rather than letting us assume.
clarification.ambiguous: "{{field}}" has conflicting values across your documents. Please choose the correct one rather than letting us assume.

language.detectedPrompt: We detected your preferred language as {{language}}. Is that correct?
language.choosePrompt: Choose the language Career Agent should use for this profile.

provider.heading: Connect an AI provider (your own key)
provider.intro: Career Agent uses your own cloud provider key. The agent ships no shared key. Your key is validated with a test call, encrypted, and stored only in this browser — it is never written into your career files.
provider.errorRecovery: Check the details and try again. Your stored configuration is unchanged.
provider.stored: A key is stored for this provider. You can replace it by entering a new one, or remove it.
provider.notStored: No key is stored for this provider yet.

status.validating: Validating your key with a test call…
status.saved: Key validated and stored encrypted in this browser.
status.removed: Stored key removed from this browser.
status.invalid: That key was rejected: {{reason}}. Please check it and try again.

local.configured: This local provider is configured and ready.
local.notConfigured: This local provider has not been tested yet.

status.testing: Testing the connection to your local server…
status.tested: Connection successful — your local provider is ready.
status.failed: Could not reach the local server: {{reason}}. Check the base URL and that your server is running.

selection.heading: Choose providers per capability
selection.intro: Pick the provider for AI/chat and the one for speech-to-text independently. For example, use a local chat model and a cloud transcription service, or the reverse. Only providers you have connected above appear here.
selection.noneChat: Connect a provider above to choose an AI/chat provider.
selection.noneStt: Connect a speech-to-text capable provider above (OpenAI or a local provider) to choose one for transcription.

ingest.heading: Add your career documents
ingest.intro: Upload your CV, certificates, or LinkedIn export, or paste text. Everything is parsed on your device — nothing is uploaded. Each item is rated by confidence and traced to its source.
ingest.assistHeading: How should we build your skills?
ingest.assistIntro: Choose once, up front, before saving — this applies across the whole pipeline (skills, roles, coaching, output). You can change it later on any screen.
ingest.fileLabel: Upload a file (PDF, Markdown, text, or LinkedIn export ZIP)
ingest.multiHint: You can select several files at once — e.g. your LinkedIn export ZIP, multiple CVs, and certificates. Add more any time.
ingest.pastePlaceholder: Paste a CV or any career text here.
ingest.errorRecovery: If the file is open in another program (like an editor), close it or save a copy, then add it again. Your already-extracted items are kept.
ingest.saved: Saved your reviewed extractions to the Memory Store.
ingest.empty: No extractions yet. Upload a document or paste text to begin.
ingest.aiDocsHeading: Your documents (the AI will read these)
ingest.aiDocsNote: In AI-only mode the AI reads your decoded documents directly and detects your skills in the Skill Map step — there is no script extraction to review here.
ingest.lowConfidence: {{count}} low-confidence PDF region(s) were flagged and excluded from extraction.
ingest.gap: A gap of about {{months}} month(s) between {{after}} ({{start}}) and {{before}} ({{end}}). Gaps are normal; you can add context later.

conversionPreview.intro: This is the full text we converted from your document, shown for inspection only. It cannot be edited here.
conversionPreview.label: Converted text for {{doc}}
conversionPreview.lowConfidence: {{count}} region(s) were uncertain during PDF extraction and were left out of this text. Check whether anything important is missing.
conversionPreview.discardHint: If the conversion looks wrong, remove this document above and paste the equivalent text instead.
conversionPreview.none: There is no converted text to preview for this document (for example, a LinkedIn export ZIP has no single text body).

sendControl.sectionHeading: Choose what to send for each file
sendControl.sectionIntro: Before any file content could be sent to an AI provider, decide per file whether to send the whole file or to allow or redact each sensitive detection. Nothing is sent until you confirm a choice.
sendControl.heading: Send control — {{doc}}
sendControl.cloudNotice: This destination is a cloud (third-party) provider, so every sensitive detection is redacted by default. Allow a detection only if you want it sent.
sendControl.localNotice: This destination is a local on-device provider, so nothing leaves your device. You can send the whole file, including sensitive values.
sendControl.noDetections: No sensitive detections were found in this file. You can still send the whole file.

skillMap.heading: Your skill map
skillMap.intro: Build an evidence-backed map of your skills from what we extracted. Each skill links to its supporting evidence.
skillMap.needExtractions: Add some documents in the Ingest phase first, then come back to generate your skill map.

manual.label: Add your own skills (one per line or comma-separated)
manual.placeholder:
e.g. Kubernetes, Incident Response
Stakeholder Management

skillMap.saved: Skill map saved to the Memory Store.

ai.optIn: Use AI to suggest more skills (opt-in)
ai.note: Opt-in: only non-private items are sent, PII is screened first, and your data is not used for training unless you consent. Suggestions need your confirmation before they count.
ai.noteCloud: Cloud provider: only non-private items are sent, PII is screened first, and your data is not used for training unless you consent. Suggestions need your confirmation before they count.
ai.noteLocal: Local on-device provider: the model running on your own machine reads your full documents — including private items — to find skills the structured extractor missed. Nothing leaves your device. Suggestions still need your confirmation before they count.
ai.added: Added {{count}} confirmed skill(s). Regenerate the map to include them.
ai.none: The AI did not suggest any new skills.

roles.heading: Discover roles
roles.intro: We suggest employed, freelance, and portfolio roles scored against your skills, with matched skills and gaps. Scores are estimates.
roles.needSkillMap: Generate your skill map first, then come back to discover matching roles.

manual.label: Add your own target roles (one per line or comma-separated)
manual.placeholder:
e.g. Staff Engineer, Engineering Manager
Platform Lead
manual.none: Those roles are already in your list.

roles.saved: Saved {{count}} role preference(s) to the Memory Store.

ai.note: Opt-in: only your skill names are sent, PII is screened first, and your data is not used for training unless you consent. AI roles are advisory until you add them.
ai.advisory: These are AI suggestions. Added roles are scored against your real skills; nothing is fabricated into your outputs.
ai.none: The AI did not recommend any roles.

coaching.heading: Interview coaching
coaching.intro: Practise STAR answers grounded in your target role, one element at a time. We turn your own words into a polished talking point — we never invent facts. Your progress saves automatically.
coaching.needRoles: Confirm at least one target role (and a skill map) first, then come back to practise.
coaching.answerComplete: All four STAR elements captured. Refine and confirm your talking point below.
coaching.sessionDone: You've reached the end of this role's questions.
coaching.noContent: Add some answer content above, then refine.

ai.heading: AI practice questions (supplement the script questions)
ai.advisory: These are AI practice prompts only. They supplement — never replace — the role-grounded script questions, and are not added to your knowledge base.
ai.explainer: Pick a question, then answer in your own words by typing or recording audio. The AI checks whether you covered the Situation, Task, Action, and Result, and asks focused follow-ups until your answer is complete. We only ever use your own words — we never invent facts.

loop.heading: STAR coaching
loop.firstAnswer: Answer in your own words — set the scene, your task, what you did, and how it turned out.
loop.capReached: You've reached the {{max}}-follow-up limit. You can dig deeper with one more follow-up, or stop here.
loop.failed: AI assist was unavailable: {{reason}}. Your answer is kept — try submitting again.
loop.summaryFailed: Couldn't generate the summary: {{reason}}. You can still confirm a talking point below.

reason.enough: Your answer covers the full STAR model. Nice work.
reason.no-follow-up: No further follow-ups — here's your summary.
reason.cap-reached: Stopped at the follow-up limit. Here's your summary.
reason.user-stop: Stopped at your request. Here's your summary so far.

audio.heading: Answer by audio instead (MP3/WAV upload)
audio.noProvider: Connect an OpenAI key in the provider setup to transcribe audio answers.
audio.transcribing: Transcribing your audio via your provider…
audio.confirm: Review and correct the transcription before it is used:

record.intro: Record your answer with your microphone. We ask for microphone permission first and never capture video.
record.recording: Recording… speak your answer, then stop.
record.denied: Microphone permission was not granted, so recording is unavailable. You can upload an audio file or type your answer instead.
record.fallback: Recording is unavailable — switched to audio upload. You can also type your answer.

answerMode.label: How would you like to answer?

sync.heading: Update skill map from this session
sync.detect: Detect skills revealed in this session
sync.intro: These skills appeared in your confirmed answers but aren't in your map yet. Confirm the ones to add — each needs a role/project and approximate time.
sync.apply: Add confirmed skills to the map
sync.none: No new skills were revealed in this session.

output.heading: Generate your CV
output.intro: Build a CV tailored to a target role from your confirmed evidence, plus an advisory LinkedIn report. Every line traces to your evidence.
output.needRoles: Confirm a target role and a skill map first, then come back to generate outputs.
output.pdfNote: PDF is typeset locally on your device (Typst via WebAssembly) — single-column, ATS-safe, with a selectable text layer. The first PDF may take a few seconds to load the typesetter.
output.pdfReady: PDF ready — your download should start.
output.pdfFailed: PDF typesetting failed: {{reason}}. Your Markdown and Word files are unaffected.
output.saved: Saved your CV and LinkedIn report to the Memory Store.
output.scriptOnlyUsed: Script-only generation was used — your CV was assembled deterministically from your confirmed evidence with no AI call.
output.aiTailoredUsed: AI-assisted tailoring was used. Your CV is still built only from your confirmed evidence; the AI notes below are advisory.

opportunity.question: Do you have a Target Opportunity (a specific job posting) to tailor this CV toward?
opportunity.none: No Target Opportunity — generate from my evidence
opportunity.pastePlaceholder: Paste the job posting text here…
opportunity.note: The posting is a tailoring target only — never a source of facts. It is PII-screened at the Egress Gate, and for a cloud provider any private items are excluded. Nothing in the posting is ever added to your CV.

ai.heading: AI tailoring suggestions (advisory)
ai.advisory: These are advisory AI suggestions. Your CV is built only from your confirmed evidence; nothing here changes it unless you apply it.

memory.heading: Memory & maintenance
memory.intro: Your Memory Store lives on your device. Export it for backup or import a previous snapshot.
memory.imported: Imported {{count}} file(s) into your Memory Store.
memory.errorRecovery: Check the file is a valid Career Agent snapshot, then try importing again. Your current Memory Store is unchanged.

assist.scriptOnlyHint: Runs entirely on your device with no provider call.
assist.unavailable: Connect an AI provider above to enable AI assist.
assist.networkLocal: Local on-device call to {{provider}} — no third-party egress; the minimised, PII-screened payload stays on your device. Suggestions need your confirmation before they count.
assist.networkThirdParty: Third-party network call to {{provider}} — only a minimised, PII-screened payload is sent. Suggestions need your confirmation before they count.
assist.fallback: AI assist was unavailable ({{reason}}). Showing the script-only result so you can continue.
assist.languageDirective: Write your entire response in English (en). Keep technical terms, tool names, and proper nouns unchanged.

payloadPreview.heading: Review what will be sent
payloadPreview.intro: Before this text is sent to {{provider}}, review it below. You can edit or remove anything you do not want transmitted. Only the text you approve is sent — and it is still PII-screened before it leaves your device.

messages.noNetworkExceptProvider: No network request is made except through the Egress Gate to your chosen provider.

ingestion.checklistIntro: Before we begin, gather these documents for the best results.
ingestion.uploadPrompt: Upload a document to extract your experience.
ingestion.reviewIntro: Review what we extracted. Confirm, edit, or remove each item.

coaching.situation: Describe the situation. What was the context?
coaching.task: What was your task or responsibility?
coaching.softClose: We can pause here and come back to this later.
coaching.pass: We can skip this question for now.

wizard.heading: Your six-phase pipeline
wizard.intro: Work through each phase, or jump directly to any phase. Career Agent saves your progress after every confirmed step.
wizard.lastPhaseFinal: This is the final phase of the pipeline.

outstanding.heading: Outstanding items
outstanding.none: Nothing outstanding. You are all caught up.

inspector.heading: Source-trace inspector
inspector.intro: Inspect any claim to see exactly where it came from. Enter a claim reference (for example BULLET-01, STAR-01, or a skill id) to view its source trace.
inspector.empty: Enter a claim reference to inspect its source trace.
inspector.unresolved: No source trace found for "{{ref}}". This claim does not resolve to any recorded provenance.
